scores.rationale: The candidate focuses the first view on purpose and note capture while respecting the named-inspiration safety constraints.
The landing and capture screens share a clear action path, stable chrome, and consistent mobile behavior.
Screen summaries, required states, keyboard behavior, thumb reach, and inline recovery are implementable.
It translates the reference into generic structure and explicitly rejects wordmark, copy, palette, iconography, and illustration.
It covers text labels, non-color state feedback, keyboard order, keyboard viewport effects, draft preservation, and retry.
The candidate distinguishes brief evidence, corpus adaptations, and open assumptions while making the proprietary boundary explicit.
